title: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs * Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs * Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OPERATION RAMP IT UP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and helps install wheelchair ramps. Also accepts donations of used aluminum wheelchair ramps. Financial donations are accepted to fund future projects and can be given in memory or honor of someone. 5299 Aspen Valley Drive Liberty Township, OH 45011 Eligibility: Military veterans or spouses of veterans who are confined to a wheelchair due to disability and have exhausted all other resources Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
